title: REDstone Torches
description: New, but now also improved 24w33a (1.21.2) redstone torches! (backported too!)
body:
REDstone Torches

- Redstone torches now have the new **24w33a (1.21.2)** look, plus some continuity fixes. - [**Polytone**](https://modrinth.com/mod/polytone) support for consistent **redstone dust colors** that match the new redstone torch model. - Slightly updated Torch and Soul Torch textures. - Improved Flame particles. (de-square-ified) Check out the **"orange"/classic** version of this resource pack! [**ORNGstone Torches**](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/orngstone-torches) Here's a list of things that have been changed from vanilla; I'll add support for mods if people would like that.
   ‒  Blocks: Comparator, Redstone Dust (0-15), Redstone Torch (On,Off), Repeater, Soul Torch, and Torch.
   ‒  Items:   Comparator, Redstone Torch, Repeater, Soul Torch, and Torch.
   ‒  Particles: Flame, and Soul Flame. (Torch Flame Particles)
Support for [**Create**](https://modrinth.com/mod/create), [**Create Fabric**](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-fabric), [**Quark**](https://modrinth.com/mod/quark):
   **Create support list:**
   ‒  Blocks: Powered Latch, Powered Toggle Latch, Pulse Extender, Pulse Repeater, Redstone Link.
   ‒  Items:   Linked Controller. (Due to a bug; ([MC-248766](https://bugs.mojang.com/browse/MC-248766)) the Linked Controller will appear incorrect.)
   **Quark support list:**
   ‒  Blocks: Redstone Randomizer.
--- **Revised redstone torches!** - Check out my other projects! [https://modrinth.com/user/zanderest](https://modrinth.com/user/zanderest)
|

TL;DR Card

The redstone torch has gotten a refresh with
some additional continuity improvements.

Every Torch model got a small touch-up
including the Comparator, Repeater, and
Redstone Dust [\*].

[\*] [Polytone](https://modrinth.com/mod/polytone) is required for the custom dust colors. || |:--- |:---:|
